End-to-End Machine Learning & AI Workflows 
overview 

I build production-ready systems across Data Science, ML, and AI 

I design, develop, and deploy machine learning and AI solutions end-to-end — from data
 preparation and modeling to deployment, monitoring, and decision support. My work
 blends strong statistical foundations with modern ML, NLP, and GenAI workflows. 

Data Science Foundations 

EDA, feature engineering, statistical modeling, forecasting, and hypothesis testing 

Model evaluation, validation, explainability, and experiment-driven analysis 

ML & AI Engineering 

Supervised ML, time-series models, and experimentation (A/B testing) 

NLP and LLM-based systems including RAG pipelines, embeddings, and prompt workflows 

Production & Impact 

ETL/ELT pipelines with Airflow, dbt, Spark/Databricks, and cloud platforms 

Model deployment, tracking, and monitoring with Docker, MLflow, and CI/CD 

Python SQL Data Science Machine Learning LLMs & RAG Docker MLflow

Featured Projects 
work 

Executive Review Intelligence (Amazon Reviews 2023) 

Production‑grade NLP/RAG system that clusters review issues, attaches evidence, and delivers action recommendations; includes RAGAS evaluation and Slack issue alerts. 

Python · LlamaIndex · ChromaDB · RAG · Streamlit 

Repo 

AI Expense Claim Processing System 

AI + computer‑vision receipt processing with FastAPI backend, ML pipeline, and Streamlit UI; supports structured extraction, confidence scoring, and analytics endpoints. 

Python · FastAPI · OCR · Docling · Streamlit 

Repo 

Financial Fine‑Tuned Chatbot 

Fine‑tuned finance‑domain LLM with RAG to answer SEC/financial reporting questions and explain metrics with grounded responses. 

Python · LLM Fine‑Tuning · RAG · FAISS 

Repo 

Teaching Assistant RAG — AI Teaching Assistant 

End‑to‑end AI teaching assistant for professors and students with course‑isolated vector stores, hybrid retrieval (TF‑IDF + embeddings), citations, and per‑student memory. 

Python · RAG · FAISS · TF‑IDF · Streamlit · OpenAI 

Repo 

Walmart Demand Forecasting (Time‑Series) 

Built a daily revenue forecasting workflow (7–30 day horizons) with model comparison; Prophet_reg achieved test MAPE ≈ 20.8%. 

Python · Prophet · LSTM · Time Series 

Repo 

A/B Testing & Uplift Modeling (Criteo) 

End‑to‑end experimentation with lift, power analysis, and uplift modeling; observed +65% relative conversion lift (p < 0.001) and targeting insights. 

Python · CausalML · Statsmodels · Uplift 

Repo 

Lead Conversion Modeling (Consumer Affairs) 

Imbalanced classification for lead conversion; best models reached ROC‑AUC ≈ 0.683 and ~2.35× lift in top‑decile leads. 

Python · scikit-learn · XGBoost · SHAP 

Repo 

A/B Testing for Marketing Campaign Optimization 

Compared Facebook vs Google Ads using hypothesis testing and regression/time‑series analysis to identify the higher‑ROI channel. 

Python · Hypothesis Testing · Statsmodels 

Repo 

Stock Market Time‑Series Analysis 

Comparative analysis of SHOP, JD, and BABA with trend/volatility diagnostics, candlestick charts, and investor‑segment insights. 

Python · yfinance · Pandas · Matplotlib 

Repo 

Heart Disease Risk Clustering (Health Care) 

Unsupervised clustering on a heart‑disease dataset using K‑Means/DBSCAN/Hierarchical with PCA and silhouette/Davies‑Bouldin evaluation; identified four risk groups. 

Python · K‑Means · DBSCAN · PCA 

Repo 

Tenant Matcher 

Preference‑based rental property matcher with dataset‑driven ranking and automated email delivery. 

Python · Pandas · Streamlit · SMTP 

Repo 

Job Web Scraping (job_web) 

Job‑focused web scraping notebook/scripts for collecting listings and related data. 

Python · Web Scraping 

Repo 

Experience 
timeline 

Data Scientist — PioneerSoft (Client: Freddie Mac) 

Jul 2025 – Present · United States 

Lead end-to-end ML delivery for regulated mortgage and housing finance analytics, covering data ingestion,
 feature engineering, model training, validation, deployment support, and ongoing monitoring with audit-ready
 documentation. 

Build predictive models for loan performance, credit risk, and portfolio behavior using Python and SQL, applying
 robust feature engineering, cross-validation, backtesting, and drift checks to ensure stable model performance. 

Develop NLP/LLM workflows (RAG, embeddings, structured extraction) to turn policy memos, underwriting notes,
 and servicing documents into measurable insights and automated analytics. 

Engineer scalable data and feature pipelines with data-quality gates, lineage, and governance controls to
 support repeatable experiments and reliable production training. 

Operationalize models with MLflow, Docker, CI/CD, and cloud tooling; create monitoring dashboards for performance,
 data drift, and compliance reporting. 

Partner with risk, compliance, and business stakeholders to translate regulatory requirements into explainable,
 production-ready ML solutions and decisioning outputs. 

Python SQL ML Systems LLMs RAG MLOps MLflow Docker CI/CD Data Pipelines Cloud 

Cox Copy Center — Support Part-time 

SMU Cox School of Business · Sep 2024 – May 2025 · Dallas, TX · On-site 

Maintained secure access to confidential materials (exam papers, keys, staff resources). 

Handled high-volume print/copy requests under tight deadlines for professors and staff. 

Point-of-contact for real-time staff support in a fast-paced academic environment. 

Assisted with building security procedures and safe closing operations after hours. 

Supported exam proctoring while upholding academic integrity. 

Communication Customer Service Team Coordination Time Management 

Student Ambassador — RLSH SMU Part-time 

Southern Methodist University · Sep 2023 – Aug 2024 · Dallas, TX · On-site 

Front-desk representative supporting student engagement and housing operations. 

Maintained accurate housing records and ensured policy clarity through consistent documentation. 

Resolved routine and urgent concerns with confidentiality and professionalism. 

Led one-on-one and group engagement to improve residential experience. 

Served as interim Program Coordinator for a Dorm Leadership Team. 

Leadership Event Planning Problem Solving Slack 

Data Analyst — Yogin 

May 2021 – May 2023 · 2 yrs · India · Hybrid 

Delivered end-to-end analytics and ML workflows, transforming multi-source data into curated datasets and models
 that supported planning, performance tracking, and operational decisions. 

Built forecasting, segmentation, and classification models with Python and SQL; applied feature engineering,
 hypothesis testing, and rigorous evaluation to produce interpretable, reliable outcomes. 

Designed ETL pipelines and automated reporting layers to improve data consistency, reduce manual effort, and
 enable scalable analysis for product and business teams. 

Developed dashboards and KPI reporting in Power BI and Tableau to translate analytical results into clear,
 actionable narratives for non-technical stakeholders. 

Prototyped early AI capabilities with NLP techniques (text classification, topic modeling, entity extraction)
 and integrated models into analytics workflows with a focus on data quality and maintainability. 

Python SQL EDA Feature Engineering Forecasting Machine Learning ETL Pipelines Data Visualization Power BI Tableau NLP
